description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Base
- Simply describe what you want in text, and Base AI will handle the building and configuration for you.
- Business systems: Base AI can build complete business systems from scratch or upgrade existing business systems. It can be used by individuals or small teams to quickly create lightweight tools, departments to build operational workflows, or organizations to create cross-team collaboration platforms.
- Tables: Base AI can generate tables from scratch or update existing tables. Fields, views, linking, and sorting can all be easily configured.
- Dashboards: Base AI can create sleek and structured dashboards with the right chart types and a logical layout based on your descriptions.
- Advanced permissions: Base AI can set up advanced permissions, including creating custom roles and configuring permissions of records, fields, views, dashboards, and more.
- The phone number question type can be used to collect respondents' mobile or landline numbers, which is great for customer registrations, follow-up visits, contact lists, and more.
